title: The Keys Become the Objective
description: Each Straw Hat faces a CP9 opponent while the rescue depends on finding the correct key before Robin reaches the Gate of Justice.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this part follows Franky, Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. Each Straw Hat faces a CP9 opponent while the rescue depends on finding the correct key before Robin reaches the Gate of Justice.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: To take this woman back, strawhat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Finally arrived at the judicial tower....!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: th-though, thanks to that, I've been saved....!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Thanks for the help, Monster BAA-SAN!!

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: Let's hurry and get to Nico Robin!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukurou
dialogue.text: You won't find nice Nico Robin...

summary: Each Straw Hat faces a CP9 opponent while the rescue depends on finding the correct key before Robin reaches the Gate of Justice.
